text: Here I am, surrounded by glass, color, and information—a modern sanctuary of ideas. The room is stark, robotic almost, and yet there's a pulse to it, a flicker of creative possibility behind those glass walls. I feel both invited and exposed, as if the boundaries between myself and progress are transparent, beckoning me to step in and participate. There is excitement here, mixed with a sliver of alienation, as if I'm an intruder in the laboratory of the future. What will I create in this space, and what will this space create within me?
